theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

narrative.summary: Ondo: 정량 종합 55점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 54 / 중기 69 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

top_news.title: Knicks' Team Sacrifices and Success Inspire New York Optimism
top_news.summary: Bill Bradley, former US Senator and two-time NBA champion, discussed the New York Knicks' recent success, highlighting how Jalen Brunson gave up millions in free agency to allow the team more financial flexibility to build a stronger roster. He emphasized that this special group's dedication and shared beliefs have led to their success, which resonates positively with New Yorkers. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: SpaceX IPO Sparks Surge in Space Industry Investment and Market Optimism
top_news.summary: Heather Pringle, CEO of the Space Foundation, discussed the impact of SpaceX's historic $75 Billion IPO on the broader space industry and investment landscape. She highlighted that SpaceX's public listing marks a significant milestone for a maturing space sector, demonstrating viable pathways to profitability through communications, launch services, and navigation technologies. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Matt Holt Said to Near $12 Billion Deal for Ensemble Health
top_news.summary: Private-equity executive Matt Holt’s investment firm Thoreau Group is in advanced talks to acquire Ensemble Health Partners in a deal valuing the company at about $12 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Chevron CEO Wirth on Energy Market Volatility
top_news.summary:
Michael K. Wirth, Chairman of the Board & CEO, Chevron Corporation discusses investment, scale and long-term strategy with Bloomberg’s Annmarie Hordern at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Energy Market Leaders on Navigating Risk
top_news.summary: Rebecca Babin, Managing Director & Senior Energy Trader, CIBC Private Wealth and Dan Pickering, Founder & Chief Investment Officer, Pickering Energy Partners discuss volatility, diversification and returns across energy markets with Bloomberg’s Julie Fine at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: BloombergNEF Global Energy Market Outlook
top_news.summary: Tom Rowlands-Rees, Head, Global Power Markets Analysis, BloombergNEF examines how the Iran conflict is reshaping energy supply, trade flows and market dynamics at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: US Energy Secretary Wright on America's Energy Strategy
top_news.summary: Chris Wright, Secretary, US Department of Energy discusses energy security, supply chains and global markets with Bloomberg’s Annmarie Hordern at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: From London to Sydney, Traders Ready to Watch SpaceX’s Debut
top_news.summary: Investors and retail traders from across the US and around the world were glued to their screens on Friday as Elon Musk’s SpaceX started trading in the stock market after the biggest initial public offering in Wall Street history.

top_news.title: Stocks Climb on US-Iran Optimism as SpaceX Debuts: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Hopes for a diplomatic breakthrough that would end the war in Iran extended a slide in oil prices while lifting stocks, with Wall Street’s enthusiasm also fueled by SpaceX’s strong trading debut.

top_news.title: Bitcoin Bottom Hunters Are Eyeing Up AI Frenzy,  SpaceX IPO
top_news.summary: Bitcoin’s rebound this week from the depths of despair below $60,000 has reignited a familiar Wall Street ritual: trying to call the bottom.

memecoin_alpha.name: Ansem
